handdown_report._description: Output format for the handdown analysis summary (Step 9). Render this as markdown, not JSON.

projects._description: One block per project inspected. Include ALL projects — updated and skipped.
projects.name: {project-name}

annotations.note: {first sentence of the extra note, max 100 chars}

_skipped_example.name: {project-name}
_skipped_example.skip_reason: no new context — existing extras already current

field_reference.cwd: Absolute path passed as base directory (e.g. /Users/joe/dev)
field_reference.date: ISO date of the handdown run (YYYY-MM-DD)
field_reference.project-name: Value of the project: field in the HANDOFF.yaml
field_reference.item-id: The id field of the annotated item (e.g. rascal-2, gap-001)

type.discovery: Cross-project dependency or unblocking relationship newly identified
type.escalation: Item identified as highest-priority in cross-project analysis
type.note: General analysis context — confirmed blocker, recommended next, caveat

field_reference.note: First sentence of the extra.note written in step 4. Truncate at 100 chars with '…' if longer.
field_reference.committed: Short git hash (7 chars) from the commit in step 8. Null/omitted if commit was skipped.
field_reference.skipped: true if the project was inspected but received zero new annotations
field_reference.skip_reason: Human-readable explanation — always 'no new context — existing extras already current' unless another reason applies
field_reference.N: Count of projects with at least one new extra entry written
field_reference.M: Total count of new extra entries written across all projects

rendered_example._description: What the markdown output looks like for a real run.
rendered_example._output:
## handdown — /Users/joe/dev (2026-04-13)

### rascal
- [rascal-2] discovery: Unblocks rascal-4 and fmtx-2 — last prerequisite before rascal↔fmtx integration
- [rascal-4] discovery: Unblocks fmtx-2 in fmtx — cross-project pair, close together
  Committed: 7f50174

### fmtx
- [fmtx-2] discovery: Depends on rascal-2 → rascal-4 → fmtx-2 chain; order now documented
  Committed: 137a48b

### sanctum
- [joe-sec-1] discovery: Depends on joe-sec-2 (binary) — can't install until binary is built
- [joe-sec-2] discovery: Unblocks joe-sec-1 — correct starting point
  Committed: d7d2014

### hooksmith
- [gap-001] discovery: Depends on gap-002 (real LLM) — integration tests premature without it
- [gap-002] escalation: Logical first step; unblocks gap-001 and makes the tool functionally complete
  Committed: 5cb9688

### minibox
  (no new context — skipped)

### devkit
  (no new context — skipped)

### atelier
  (no new context — skipped)

---
4 project(s) updated, 7 item(s) annotated.
